arts.ttl: Napoli Handed Decisive Injury Boost Ahead of Inter Showdown
arts.sum: Serie A pacesetters Napoli have received a significant injury boost ahead of Sunday night's mouth-watering league clash against Inter. According to Partenopei boss Antonio Conte via Calciomercato, Stanislav Lobotka is available for selection after missing out on the last two matches due to injury. The post Napoli Handed Decisive Injury Boost Ahead of Inter Showdown appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay given special Inter Milan assignment as Napoli look to retain top spot in San Siro showdown
arts.sum: The top two in Serie A face off on second placed Inter host leaders Napoli
